title: Floral Fragrant Moroccan Tomato Tagine
description: A fragrant, vegetarian Moroccan tagine bursting with tomatoes, aromatic rose petals and orange blossom water, served over fluffy couscous.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a tagine or deep skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, dried rose petals, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and turmeric; sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add crushed tomatoes and vegetable broth, season with salt and pepper, and bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Stir in chopped parsley and a splash of orange blossom water; simmer uncovered for another 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare couscous by sprinkling it in a heatproof bowl, pouring boiling water, covering, and letting it steam for 5 minutes.
Fluff couscous with a fork, then serve the tomato tagine over the couscous, garnished with toasted almonds if using.
